case_title: ADIL KARRAR VS. CANDLESTICK POINT - COVE HOA C/O ARTHUR LIVITZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2019 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,191.00 FILED BY KARRAR, ADIL AS TO DEFENDANT CANDLESTICK POINT - COVE HOA C/O ARTHUR LIVITZ ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TAMMY MCNAUGHT, PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT CANDLESTICK POINT - COVE HOA C/O ARTHUR LIVITZ ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-03-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CANDLESTICK POINT - COVE HOA C/O ARTHUR LIVITZ ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-18-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ADIL KARRAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CANDELSTICK POINT - COVE HOA C/O ARTHUR LIVITZ, REPRESETNED BY TAMMY MCNAUGHT, PROPERTY MANAGER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KARRAR, ADIL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CANDLESTICK POINT - COVE HOA C/O ARTHUR LIVITZ ASSOCIATION CIVIL CODE 4775(B) COVERS PLAINTIFF'S SITUATION. THE CC & R READ AS A WHOLE DO NOT PROVIDE A BASIS FOR SEPARATE TREATMENT OF UTILITIES AND OTHER EXPENSES WHICH ARE SUBJECT TO ASSESSMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KARRAR, ADIL AS TO DEFENDANT CANDLESTICK POINT - COVE HOA C/O ARTHUR LIVITZ ASSOCIATION
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF DEC-02-2019
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
